examples: Doctors classify amyloidosis into three major forms.
Family history. Some cases of amyloidosis are inherited.
Weider remained active "almost until the end, " even after being diagnosed 12 years ago with a heart condition, amyloidosis, said his publicist Charlotte Parker.
Last month, the City of Pittsburgh hosted the 35th annual Great Race, a charity run that raises money for the Richard S. Caliguiri Amyloidosis Research Fund.
